title: ALM Entity Migration Status Report
description: Comprehensive status of all alm_ entity migrations from legacy SQL through staging to Dataverse

boulders.name: Entity Inventory
boulders.description: Complete list of all alm_ prefixed entities with their current migration status and notes on blockers or dependencies

stack.instruction: Extract all entities with logicalName starting with 'alm_'. Return array of {logicalName, entitySetName, primaryId, attributeCount: number of attributes}
List all pipeline names that reference alm_ entities in their SQL queries or parameters

criteria.description: Table with entity name, migration status, associated pipeline, and notes
At least one row per entity found in schema index
Each entity has a status value from: Complete, In Progress, Not Started, Blocked, N/A
Entities with status 'Blocked' must have a note explaining the blocker

boulders.name: Pipeline Coverage
boulders.description: Summary of which pipelines handle which entities, run frequency, and recent success/failure rates

stack.instruction: For each pipeline, extract: name, entities referenced in SQL, any ForEach loops or parameterized entity lists

criteria.description: Table mapping pipelines to entities with coverage notes
Every entity from the Entity Inventory boulder is covered by at least one pipeline, or explicitly marked as 'No pipeline' with explanation

boulders.name: Open Issues
boulders.description: Active errors and blockers related to the migration

stack.instruction: List recent error files with timestamps and brief descriptions of the failures

criteria.description: Table of active errors with entity association
Each error is linked to a specific entity from the Entity Inventory, or marked as 'cross-cutting' with explanation
